discussion_comments.comment_body: The keys accepted by the two commands are the same, so I initially reused the existing `sintercardGetKeys`. I’ll add a separate `sunioncardGetKeys` for clarity. Thanks for pointing out the ambiguity, @sundb!

not sure if it's appropriate, `generic` is applicable to all kinds of keys, but obviously this one is not.
ref: https://redis.io/docs/latest/commands/?group=generic
